POL.Name: neg_eg
POL.Comment: DEF: Recode negative incomes to zero

POL.Name: bsach_eg
POL.Comment: BEN: Takaful Conditional Cash Transfer (Da'm Takaful)

POL.Name: tva_eg
POL.Comment: TAX: Value Added Tax (Daribat al-Qima al-Mudafa)

POL.Name: xhhadj_eg
POL.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income

POL.Name: bsafo_eg
POL.Comment: BEN: Tamween Food Commodity Allowance (Badl Tamweeni - Sila')

POL.Name: boak_eg
POL.Comment: BEN: Karama Unconditional Cash Transfer (Da'm Karama)

FUN.Name: Uprate
FUN.Comment: Define uprating factors applied to monetary variables

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Standard disposable income (not accounting for own produce) (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income taking into account in-kind benefits

FUN.Name: DefTu
FUN.Comment: Define tax unit - OECD Household definition

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative self-employment income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative property income income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative transfare income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative rental income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative disposable income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Deduct employee SIC from gross salary

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply tax credit to gross tax

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Convert annual tax to monthly & output

FUN.Name: SchedCalc
FUN.Comment: Progressive tax schedule (2019) Same bands/rates as Fn 8

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Determine tax credit (discount) rate, Same credit rates as Fn 9

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply tax credit to gross tax ,Same formula as Fn 10

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Impute variable salary from total employment income

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply monthly cap to basic salary

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply monthly cap to variable salary

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Identify those eligible to pay self-employed contributions

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: First Schedule rates (Table Tax ONLY, no VAT) Constants

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: Second Schedule rates (Table Tax added ON TOP of 14% VAT) Constants

FUN.Name: RandSeed
FUN.Comment: Set random seed for reproducible results

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Assign random number to eligible HHs

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Take-up adjustment: keep only X% of beneficiaries

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply 700 EGP floor (only active for EG_2025)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Apply 700 EGP floor (only active for EG_2025)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 02 - Alcoholic beverages, tobacco, and narcotics

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 04 - Housing, water, electricity, gas and other fuels

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 13 - Personal care, social protection and miscellaneous goods and services

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social security contributions (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Child benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social assistance benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Orphan/widows benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disability benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Unemployment benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Agricultural benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal income taking into account own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Simulated consumption (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: Specify share of own-production consumed that is protected from changes

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Exclusion screen: flag if ANY criterion met

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: If this household passed all the exclusion checks, then it is eligible for Tamween.

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: VAT correction: 14% on Table Tax for 2nd Schedule items

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Schedule 2 soda/carbonated 8%. Inserts i_tex_soda intermediate, parallels the other Schedule 2 lines.

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Schedule 1 oils/fats blended 2% (calibrate Stage 3). Inserts i_tex_oils intermediate, parallels i_tex_soap.

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Total monthly loaf entitlement for household

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Bread points value (added to bread subsidy)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Combined HH gate → i_kar_hh_gate (broadcast to all members)

FUN.Name: RandSeed
FUN.Comment: Set random seed for reproducible results

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Qualifying flag = sum of category flags

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: In-cap flag using data's kar_rank (3-card cap per Article 13)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Aggregate the four category outputs into boak_s

PAR.Name: x0312
PAR.Comment: Clothes for men, women and children

PAR.Name: x0210
PAR.Comment: Expenses on alcohol and tobacco (main aggregate for this category)

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

PAR.Name: Members
PAR.Comment: Specify members of the family unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

PAR.Name: PartnerCond
PAR.Comment: Default = head: idperson=idpartner i.e., one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

PAR.Name: i_tin_sic_ded
PAR.Comment: Total SIC deductions (from tscee_eg when modelled)

PAR.Name: i_tin_tax_gross
PAR.Comment: Gross tax from the progressive schedule (before credit)

PAR.Name: i_tin_netY
PAR.Comment: Net taxable income (gross minus all deductions)

PAR.Name: i_tin_ee_s
PAR.Comment: Employment PIT (monthly, rename from previous tin_s output)

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Formal workers (lfo=1) with positive employment income

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Monthly employment income * 12 to get annual

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Store in gross annual income variable

PAR.Name: Who_Must_Be_Elig
PAR.Comment: Only for those eligible (from Elig above)

PAR.Name: LowLim
PAR.Comment: Ensure net taxable income is not negative

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: For 2019, income in 0% bracket - no tax, no credit. For 2020 forward (no phase-out (≤600k))

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: Credit rate = 7.5%, from 2020 lost 0% thru rate3

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Tax = Gross tax - (Gross tax * credit rate), from 2020 total EE tax = standard schedule + phase-out adjustment

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Annual tax divided by 12, from 2020 this (feeds into Fn24 combined output)

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: FINAL output: simulated personal income tax

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Tax = Gross tax - (Gross tax * credit rate), from 2020 total SE tax = standard schedule + phase-out adjustment

PAR.Name: Who_Must_Be_Elig
PAR.Comment: Impute basic salary from total employment income

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Min of imputed basic and EGP 1,670

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Min of imputed variable and EGP 4,040

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Unified employee SSC (Law 148/2019) for years after 2019

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Simulated employee SSC (monthly) in 2019, after Compute capped insurable salary (unified system

PAR.Name: $tam_max_card
PAR.Comment: Max beneficiaries per card(this is 4 for new cards after 2021 but there is no data to indcate that so we keep it 15 the max household size in the data)

PAR.Name: $tak_school_excl
PAR.Comment: Private school fee exclusion per child

PAR.Name: $tak_max_children
PAR.Comment: Max children for add-ons (2019: two-child cap)

PAR.Name: $kar_pmt_cutoff
PAR.Comment: PMT threshold for Karama (single cutoff, no male/female split)

PAR.Name: $kar_amt_disabled
PAR.Comment: Monthly benefit for severely disabled (Level 3 + chronic illness collapsed)

PAR.Name: $kar_max_persons
PAR.Comment: Statutory maximum number of Karama cards per HH (Article 13)

PAR.Name: $kar_school_excl
PAR.Comment: Annual private school fee exclusion (same as Takaful)

PAR.Name: $kar_priority_nonqualif
PAR.Comment: Sentinel priority for non-qualifying members (sorted last)

PAR.Name: $kar_priority_vulnwoman
PAR.Comment: Article 13 priority rank for vulnerable woman 50+

PAR.Name: $kar_priority_disabled
PAR.Comment: Article 13 priority rank for severe disability (highest)

PAR.Name: $kar_age_vulnwoman_min
PAR.Comment: Min age for vulnerable woman eligibility

PAR.Name: $kar_age_disabled_min
PAR.Comment: Min age for disabled-adult eligibility (excludes child disability from priority 1)

PAR.Name: $tex_fertilizer
PAR.Comment: Fertilizers/pesticides (5%) — not in HH data but keep for reform

PAR.Name: $tex_gypsum
PAR.Comment: Gypsum/masonry (5%) — not in HH data but keep for reform

PAR.Name: $tex_media
PAR.Comment: Statute: 5% on B2B media/programme production. No matching base in HIECS (consumer-side). Kept for reform scenarios only; not used in any active formula

PAR.Name: $tex_oils
PAR.Comment: Blended Schedule 1 rate for edible oils/fats. Statute: 1% on vegetable oils, 5% on animal/hydrogenated oils. HIECS x011505 is aggregate — use blend reflecting predominantly vegetable-oil Egyptian consumption basket.

PAR.Name: $tex_car_small
PAR.Comment: Cars <1600cc 1% — statute correct. Engine bands not separable in HIECS x0711 (aggregate). Orphan, kept for reform scenarios.

PAR.Name: $tex_car_mid
PAR.Comment: Cars 1600-2000cc 15% — statute correct. Engine bands not separable in HIECS x0711. Orphan, kept for reform scenarios.

PAR.Name: $tex_car_large
PAR.Comment: Cars >2000cc 30% — statute correct. Engine bands not separable in HIECS x0711. Orphan, kept for reform scenarios.

PAR.Name: $tex_tobacco_advlrm
PAR.Comment: Tobacco ad valorem 50% — statute correct. Specific-per-pack component NOT simulable from HIECS (monetary expenditure only, no quantity). Orphan, kept for reform scenarios.

PAR.Name: $tex_beer
PAR.Comment: Beer 250% (pre-July 2025). Per Law 157/2025: replaced by fixed EGP/hectolitre by ABV band (not simulable without quantities). Orphan because x0211 not separable from x0210 in HIECS. Kept for reform.

PAR.Name: $tex_spirits
PAR.Comment: Wine/spirits 150% (pre-July 2025). Same post-2025 fixed-rate issue. Orphan, kept for reform.

PAR.Name: $tex_alc_tob_blend
PAR.Comment: Year-varying calibrated tobacco effective rate on retail price. Source: WHO Tobacco Taxation Report, MoF schedule tax tiers (Law 67/2016, Law 177/2023, Law 157/2025).Proxy reflecting hybrid statutory structure (50% ad valorem + fixed EGP/pack) which cannot be faithfully simulated from monetary expenditure alone.

PAR.Name: $tex_soda
PAR.Comment: Soda/carbonated non-alcoholic beverages 8% Table Tax. Statute: Schedule 2 (8% + 14% VAT)

PAR.Name: $vat_reduced
PAR.Comment: 5% reduced VAT for industrial machinery — not in HH data, kept for reform scenarios

PAR.Name: $ExtPovline
PAR.Comment: Extreme PL (calorie-weighted scale): calibrated to official rate — CAPMAS 4.5% in 2019, off-model CBN 5.6% in 2021

PAR.Name: $Povline
PAR.Comment: Standard PL (calorie-weighted scale): calibrated to official rate — CAPMAS 29.7% in 2019, WB 33.5% in 2021

PAR.Name: $Povline
PAR.Comment: Standard PL (per capita): 2019 official CAPMAS line; 2021 reverse-engineered to World Bank 33.5% estimated following CAPMAS official approach

PAR.Name: $ExtPovline
PAR.Comment: Extreme PL (per capita): 2019 official CAPMAS line; 2021 reverse-engineered to off-model CBN 5.6%

PAR.Name: $Ind_ExtPovline
PAR.Comment: Extreme PL, post-fiscal — (per capita weighted scale)

PAR.Name: $Ind_Povline
PAR.Comment: Standard PL, post-fiscal — ( per capita scale)

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Head is pensioner (proxy for govt pension)

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Keep benefit for randomly selected HHs

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Scale base formula by year-specific multiplier

PAR.Name: x0210
PAR.Comment: Expenses on alcohol and tobacco (main aggregate for this category)

PAR.Name: x0312
PAR.Comment: Clothes for men, women and children

PAR.Name: x0431
PAR.Comment: Maintenance and repair for the Dwelling

PAR.Name: x0562
PAR.Comment: Small other housing equipment and operation

PAR.Name: x0561
PAR.Comment: Major other housing equipment and operation

PAR.Name: x0541
PAR.Comment: Goods and services for routine household maintenance

PAR.Name: x0722
PAR.Comment: Operation of personal transport equipment expenditures (fuel, maintenance, repairs, parts, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0731
PAR.Comment: Transportation services expenditures (public transport, taxis, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0821
PAR.Comment: Telephone equipment expenditures (mobile phones, landline phones, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0831
PAR.Comment: Postal and Telephone services expenditures (postage, mobile plans, internet, landline services)

PAR.Name: x0911
PAR.Comment: Major durables for recreation expenditures (televisions, stereos, computers, sports equipment, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0912
PAR.Comment: Other recreational items and equipment expenditures (toys, hobbies, sports gear, camping equipment, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0941
PAR.Comment: Recreational and Cultural services expenditures (cinema, theater, museums, sports events, streaming services, etc.)

PAR.Name: x0951
PAR.Comment: School books and supplies expenditures (includes books, stationery, school supplies)

PAR.Name: x1051
PAR.Comment: Other education expenditures (vocational training, tutoring, language courses, etc.)

PAR.Name: x1111
PAR.Comment: Catering services expenditures (restaurants, cafés, fast food, takeaway meals)

PAR.Name: x1121
PAR.Comment: Accommodation services expenditures (hotels, motels, guest houses, holiday rentals)

PAR.Name: x1211
PAR.Comment: Personal care expenditures (haircuts, beauty treatments, toiletries, etc.)

PAR.Name: x1212
PAR.Comment: Personal effects expenditures (jewelry, watches, handbags, etc.)

PAR.Name: x1281
PAR.Comment: Private transfers given expenditures (remittances, gifts to non-household members)

PAR.Name: bsach_s
PAR.Comment: Takaful is child-directed (conditional on child school/health attendance)

PAR.Name: ils_dispyx
PAR.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income higher than in base year (or the same)

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Assign to variable of simulated consumption

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income smaller than in base year

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: $protect_cons
PAR.Comment: Constant share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock

PAR.Name: i_tam_n_full
PAR.Comment: Number of members at full rate

PAR.Name: i_tam_n_reduced
PAR.Comment: Number of members at reduced rate

PAR.Name: i_tam_setax_head
PAR.Comment: Head's SE tax final (zero for non-heads)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: HH size capped at max card size

PAR.Name: Who_Must_Be_Elig
PAR.Comment: At least one member eligible (from Fn 3)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Card members capped at full-rate limit

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Total on card minus full-rate members

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: 14% on the table tax amounts of 2nd Schedule items

PAR.Name: Output_Add_Var
PAR.Comment: ADD to existing VAT from tva_eg

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Universal: all households eligible for bread subsidy

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Consumed loaves * (total production cost - price the citizen pay)

PAR.Name: i_kar_hh_excl
PAR.Comment: HH-level: 1 if HH hits any exclusion criterion

PAR.Name: i_kar_hh_pmt_pass
PAR.Comment: HH-level: 1 if HH passes PMT threshold

PAR.Name: i_kar_hh_gate
PAR.Comment: HH-level: 1 if HH passes both exclusion AND PMT

PAR.Name: i_kar_takeup_pass
PAR.Comment: HH-level: OFF keeps takeup_pass = 1 (full take-up). BRO ON lets Function 1.14 overwrite to 0 or 1.

PAR.Name: i_kar_rand
PAR.Comment: HH-level: random draw (only used when BRO-ON)

PAR.Name: i_kar_in_cap
PAR.Comment: Indiv: in top 3 per HH (computed from kar_rank)

PAR.Name: i_kar_is_qualif
PAR.Comment: Indiv: qualifies in any category (sum of four flags)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: 1 only if HH not excluded AND passes PMT

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Draw once per HH, broadcast to all members.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: All ddi=1 adults treated as severely disabled (data limitation)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Both parents absent from HH (data limitation — undercounts single-orphans)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Always 0 or 1 (categories mutually exclusive by construction)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: kar_rank from input data ranks qualifiers 1..N by Article 13 priority; top 3 = in-cap

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Indiv flag ( gated by qualif AND rank)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: "OFF: takeup_pass=1 (DefVar), formula = ungated amount. ON: HH-head takeup_pass broadcast via #1."

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: For square root equivalence scale replace ses01 by ses02

SYS_PAR.Value: i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils
i_tex_constr + i_tex_soap + i_tex_telecom + i_tex_appliance + i_tex_tv + i_tex_cosmetics + i_tex_vehicle + i_tex_alctob + i_tex_soda + i_tex_oils

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Overall
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. Column 'YYYY' = FY YYYY/(YYYY+1). 2025 = FY 2025/26 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Food
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. Column 'YYYY' = FY YYYY/(YYYY+1). 2025 = FY 2025/26 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Alcohol_Tobacco
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. Column 'YYYY' = FY YYYY/(YYYY+1). 2025 = FY 2025/26 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Clothing_Footwear
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. Column 'YYYY' = FY YYYY/(YYYY+1). 2025 = FY 2025/26 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Housing_Water_Energy
UPIND.Description: Housing, water, electricity, gas, fuels CPI
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Furnishings
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Health
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Transport
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Communication
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Recreation_Culture
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Education
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Restaurants_Hotels
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_CPI_Miscellaneous
UPIND.Comment: CAPMAS Annual CPI bulletins, fiscal-year average. Base FY 2018/19 = 100. 2025 forecast based on Mar 2026 monthly bulletin YoY rate applied to FY 2024/25 average.

UPIND.Name: $f_Wage
UPIND.Comment: Average gross wage, all sectors. CAPMAS Annual Bulletin of Employment, Wages & Working Hours Statistics (CY 2020–2024). 2019 backcast and 2025 forecast via MoF Bab 1 (Wages & Compensation) anchor. Calendar-year basis, base CY 2019 = 100.
